# fcs_iaas_network (Resource)

A VM network inside an fcs_iaas_vdc. The platform owns KubeOVN subnet, Harvester NAD and NAT gateway realization; Terraform manages the stable network intent.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cidr` (String) VM network CIDR. Changing it forces a new network.
- `environment_id` (String) ID of the fcs_environment hosting the IaaS-vDC. Changing it forces a new network.
- `name` (String) Network name; idempotency key per vDC. Changing it forces a new network.
- `vdc_id` (String) ID of the fcs_iaas_vdc containing this network. Changing it forces a new network.

### Optional

- `policy_default` (String) Default east-west policy for this vDC network: private | allow. Changing it forces a new network.
- `timeouts` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp (RFC 3339).
- `default_gateway_ip` (String) Default gateway IP for VMs on this network.
- `harvester_nad_name` (String) Harvester NetworkAttachmentDefinition name for the realized network.
- `harvester_namespace` (String) Harvester namespace for the realized network.
- `id` (String) Server-assigned IaaS network ID (UUID).
- `kubeovn_subnet_name` (String) KubeOVN subnet name for the realized network.
- `status` (String) Lifecycle status: planned | provisioning | active | error | destroying | destroyed.
- `vlan_id` (Number) Platform-assigned VLAN ID once the network is realized.

<a id="nestedatt--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `create` (String) How long to wait for the IaaS network to reach status=active (default 20m0s). Accepts a duration string such as "30m".
- `delete` (String) How long to wait for the network teardown to finish (GET returns 404 or status=destroyed; default 15m0s).
